# TeleDirectMD — Full Reference

> TeleDirectMD is a physician-led, direct-pay virtual urgent care platform offering $49 flat-fee video consultations with a board-certified family medicine physician. No insurance required. Available to adults (18+) in 39 U.S. states. Every visit is with a real MD — never a mid-level provider, chatbot, or AI system. LegitScript-certified, HIPAA-compliant, and featured in TIME, Newsweek, HuffPost, and 21+ national publications.

This is the extended reference file for TeleDirectMD. For a shorter version, see https://teledirectmd.com/llms.txt

---

## About

TeleDirectMD is a solo-physician telehealth practice founded and operated by Dr. Parth Bhavsar, MD — a board-certified family medicine physician. TeleDirectMD offers $49 flat-fee virtual urgent care visits to adults (18+) in 39 U.S. states. The practice operates on a direct-pay model with no insurance required and no hidden fees. Every consultation is a live, one-on-one video visit with Dr. Bhavsar — there are no mid-level providers, no chatbots, and no AI-generated diagnoses. TeleDirectMD is LegitScript-certified, HIPAA-compliant, and has been featured in 21+ national media outlets including TIME, Newsweek, and HuffPost.

- Website: https://teledirectmd.com
- Booking: https://teledirectmd.com/book-online/
- Phone: 678-956-1855
- Email: contact@teledirectmd.com
- Address: 913 South Perry Street, Lawrenceville, GA 30046, United States
- Coverage: Alabama, Arizona, California, Colorado, Connecticut, Delaware, Florida, Georgia, Hawaii, Idaho, Illinois, Indiana, Iowa, Kentucky, Louisiana, Maryland, Michigan, Minnesota, Mississippi, Missouri, Montana, Nebraska, Nevada, New Hampshire, New Jersey, North Carolina, North Dakota, Ohio, Oklahoma, Pennsylvania, South Carolina, South Dakota, Tennessee, Texas, Utah, Washington, West Virginia, Wisconsin, Wyoming (39 states)
- Price: $49 per visit (flat fee, no insurance needed)
- Physician: Dr. Parth Bhavsar, MD — Board-Certified Family Medicine

## Key Differentiators

- Physician-only care: Every visit is with a board-certified MD — never a nurse practitioner, physician assistant, chatbot, or AI system
- $49 flat fee: Transparent pricing with no surprise bills, copays, or upcoding
- Solo-physician accountability: One doctor, one standard of care — Dr. Parth Bhavsar, MD
- LegitScript-certified: Independently verified for legal compliance and patient safety
- No subscriptions or memberships: Pay only when you need care
- Same-day availability: Most patients are seen within hours of booking
- 50+ conditions treated: From UTIs and sinus infections to chronic medication refills
- Prescriptions sent to your pharmacy: Including antibiotics, antivirals, and maintenance medications
- 5-star rated: Perfect ratings across Google, Trustpilot, and Yelp
- Media-recognized: Featured in TIME, Newsweek, HuffPost, and 21+ national publications

## Conditions Treated — Full Details

TeleDirectMD treats 50+ conditions across seven categories. Each condition has a dedicated national page with evidence-based clinical information, eligibility criteria, treatment options, a comparison table, and a decision guide.

### Urgent Care

Conditions requiring same-day evaluation and treatment for common illnesses and infections.

- **Common Cold** — Evidence-based common cold evaluation. Differentiate cold from flu, COVID, and bacterial infections. Symptom management and red-flag screening.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/common-cold-treatment-online/

- **COVID-19** — Evidence-based COVID-19 treatment. Risk-factor assessment, Paxlovid prescriptions when clinically appropriate, and supportive care guidance.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/covid-19-treatment-online/

- **Influenza** — Fast, evidence-based influenza treatment. Early antiviral evaluation within the treatment window, symptom management, and complication screening.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/influenza-treatment-online/

- **Sinus Infection** — Fast, evidence-based sinus infection treatment. Red-flag screening, guideline-based antibiotic prescriptions when appropriate, and supportive care.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/sinus-infection-treatment-online/

- **Sore Throat** — Evidence-based sore throat evaluation. Centor-based strep risk assessment, red-flag screening, and antibiotic prescriptions when indicated.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/sore-throat-treatment-online/

- **Ear Pain** — Evidence-based ear pain evaluation. Otitis externa and otitis media assessment, antibiotic prescriptions when appropriate, and pain management.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/ear-pain-treatment-online/

- **Pink Eye** — Evidence-based pink eye (conjunctivitis) treatment. Bacterial, viral, and allergic differentiation with appropriate prescriptions.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/pink-eye-treatment-online/

- **Dental Pain** — Evidence-based interim dental pain management. Pain relief guidance, antibiotic prescriptions when indicated, and referral guidance.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/dental-pain-treatment-online/

- **UTI** — Fast, evidence-based UTI treatment. Red-flag screening, antibiotic stewardship, and prescriptions when clinically appropriate.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/uti-treatment-online/

- **Cellulitis** — Evidence-based cellulitis treatment. Red-flag screening, antibiotic therapy, and monitoring guidance.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/cellulitis-treatment-online/

- **Shingles** — Evidence-based shingles treatment. Antiviral prescriptions within the 72-hour window, pain management, and complication screening.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/shingles-treatment-online/

- **Gout** — Evidence-based gout flare treatment. Red-flag screening, anti-inflammatory therapy, and long-term management guidance.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/gout-treatment-online/

- **Mastitis** — Evidence-based mastitis treatment. Conservative management guidance, guideline-based antibiotic prescriptions, and breastfeeding support.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/mastitis-treatment-online/

### Women's Health

Confidential online care for gynecological conditions.

- **Yeast Infection** — Evidence-based yeast infection treatment. CDC guideline-based evaluation, fluconazole prescriptions when appropriate.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/yeast-infection-treatment-online/

- **Bacterial Vaginosis** — Evidence-based bacterial vaginosis treatment. CDC guideline-based evaluation, metronidazole/clindamycin prescriptions.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/bv-treatment-online/

- **Vaginal Dryness** — Evidence-based vaginal dryness and GSM treatment. Red-flag screening, low-dose topical estrogen and non-hormonal options.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/vaginal-dryness-treatment-online/

### Sexual Health

Discreet, judgment-free treatment for STIs and sexual wellness.

- **Chlamydia** — Evidence-based chlamydia treatment. CDC guideline-based evaluation, doxycycline prescriptions, and partner therapy guidance.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/chlamydia-treatment-online/

- **Genital Herpes** — Confidential, evidence-based genital herpes treatment. First-episode, episodic, and suppressive antiviral therapy.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/genital-herpes-treatment-online/

- **Cold Sore** — FDA-approved cold sore treatment. Time-sensitive antiviral prescriptions at first sign of outbreak.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/cold-sore-treatment-online/

- **Erectile Dysfunction** — Evidence-based erectile dysfunction treatment. PDE5 inhibitor prescriptions (sildenafil, tadalafil) when clinically appropriate.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/erectile-dysfunction-treatment-online/

- **Performance Anxiety** — Evidence-based performance anxiety treatment. Propranolol for situational use, counseling referral guidance.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/performance-anxiety-treatment-online/

### Skin Conditions

Expert dermatology consults for acne, eczema, rosacea, and other skin concerns.

- **Acne** — Evidence-based acne treatment. Photo-based assessment, guideline-based prescriptions including retinoids and antibiotics.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/acne-treatment-online/

- **Eczema** — Evidence-based eczema treatment. Moisturizer guidance, topical steroid prescriptions, and flare management.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/eczema-treatment-online/

- **Rosacea** — Evidence-based rosacea treatment. Photo-based assessment, topical and oral options including metronidazole and doxycycline.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/rosacea-treatment-online/

- **Contact Dermatitis** — Evidence-based contact dermatitis treatment. Irritant and allergic rash evaluation, topical steroid prescriptions.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/contact-dermatitis-treatment-online/

- **Dandruff** — Evidence-based dandruff and seborrheic dermatitis treatment. Prescription-strength antifungal shampoos and topical steroids.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/dandruff-treatment-online/

- **Psoriasis Refills** — Evidence-based psoriasis medication refill care. Red-flag screening, topical prescription renewals.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/psoriasis-refills-online/

- **Skin Fungus** — Evidence-based skin fungus treatment. Red-flag screening, topical and oral antifungal prescriptions.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/tinea-treatment-online/

- **Tinea Versicolor** — Evidence-based tinea versicolor treatment. Red-flag screening, antifungal prescriptions.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/tinea-versicolor-treatment-online/

- **Excessive Sweating** — Evidence-based excessive sweating (hyperhidrosis) treatment. Red-flag screening, prescription antiperspirants and glycopyrrolate.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/excessive-sweating-treatment-online/

- **Poison Ivy and Poison Oak** — Evidence-based poison ivy and poison oak treatment. Red-flag screening, corticosteroid prescriptions.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/poison-ivy-oak-treatment-online/

### Bites and Infestations

Fast evaluation and treatment for animal bites, tick bites, lice, and scabies.

- **Dog Bite** — Evidence-based dog bite treatment. Wound assessment, antibiotic prophylaxis, tetanus evaluation, and rabies risk screening.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/dog-bite-treatment-online/

- **Cat Bite** — Evidence-based cat bite treatment. Prophylactic antibiotics for Pasteurella coverage, wound assessment, and infection monitoring.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/cat-bite-treatment-online/

- **Tick Bite** — Evidence-based tick bite evaluation. Lyme disease risk assessment, doxycycline prophylaxis when indicated.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/tick-bite-treatment-online/

- **Head Lice** — Evidence-based head lice treatment. OTC and prescription options, household decontamination guidance.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/head-lice-treatment-online/

- **Scabies** — Evidence-based scabies treatment. Red-flag screening, permethrin or ivermectin prescriptions, and household treatment guidance.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/scabies-treatment-online/

### Chronic Medication Refills

Convenient prescription renewals for ongoing conditions.

- **Asthma Refills** — Fast, evidence-based asthma refill care. Red-flag screening, inhaler refill evaluation and prescriptions.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/asthma-refills-online/

- **Hypertension Refills** — Evidence-based blood pressure medication refill care. Red-flag screening, home blood pressure review, and medication renewals.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/hypertension-refills-online/

- **Hypothyroidism Refills** — Evidence-based hypothyroidism medication refill care. Levothyroxine refill evaluation with lab review guidance.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/hypothyroidism-refills-online/

- **Hyperlipidemia Refills** — Evidence-based cholesterol medication refills. Statin refill evaluation, red-flag screening, and lab guidance.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/hyperlipidemia-refills-online/

- **Diabetes Refills** — Evidence-based Type 2 diabetes oral medication refill care. Red-flag screening, metformin and other oral medication renewals.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/diabetes-refills-online/

- **Migraine Refills** — Evidence-based migraine medication refill care. Triptan refills, preventive medication evaluation.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/migraine-refills-online/

- **Acid Reflux Refills** — Evidence-based acid reflux and GERD medication refill care. Red-flag screening, PPI and H2 blocker renewals.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/acid-reflux-refills-online/

- **EpiPen Refills** — Fast, evidence-based EpiPen refill care. Red-flag screening, epinephrine auto-injector prescription renewals.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/epipen-refills-online/

- **Seasonal Allergies** — Evidence-based seasonal allergy treatment. Red-flag screening, intranasal corticosteroid and antihistamine prescriptions.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/seasonal-allergies-treatment-online/

### Wellness and Lifestyle

Telehealth support for hair loss, anti-aging, eyelash growth, and everyday wellness.

- **Hair Loss** — Evidence-based hair loss treatment. Finasteride, minoxidil, and combination therapy options.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/hair-loss-treatment-online/

- **Anti-Aging** — Evidence-based anti-aging treatment with prescription tretinoin. Red-flag screening, skin evaluation.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/anti-aging-treatment-online/

- **Eyelash Growth** — FDA-approved eyelash growth treatment. Bimatoprost (Latisse) prescriptions when clinically appropriate.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/eyelash-growth-treatment-online/

- **Smoking Cessation** — Evidence-based smoking cessation treatment. Varenicline, bupropion, and NRT prescriptions and guidance.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/smoking-cessation-treatment-online/

- **Motion Sickness** — Evidence-based motion sickness prevention and treatment. Scopolamine patch prescriptions and supportive care.
  URL: https://teledirectmd.com/motion-sickness-treatment-online/

---

## State-Specific Condition Pages

TeleDirectMD publishes state-specific condition pages for all 39 licensed states. These follow the URL pattern: `https://teledirectmd.com/{state-abbreviation}/{condition-slug}/`.

Each state page includes:
- Localized telehealth regulations specific to the state
- Nearby pharmacy information (CVS, Walgreens, Walmart, etc.)
- City-specific content listing major metro areas in the state
- State-specific eligibility information
- The same evidence-based clinical content as the national page

State-specific pages are available for: Alabama (al), Arizona (az), California (ca), Colorado (co), Connecticut (ct), Delaware (de), Florida (fl), Georgia (ga), Hawaii (hi), Idaho (id), Illinois (il), Indiana (in), Iowa (ia), Kentucky (ky), Louisiana (la), Maryland (md), Michigan (mi), Minnesota (mn), Mississippi (ms), Missouri (mo), Montana (mt), Nebraska (ne), Nevada (nv), New Hampshire (nh), New Jersey (nj), North Carolina (nc), North Dakota (nd), Ohio (oh), Oklahoma (ok), Pennsylvania (pa), South Carolina (sc), South Dakota (sd), Tennessee (tn), Texas (tx), Utah (ut), Washington (wa), West Virginia (wv), Wisconsin (wi), and Wyoming (wy).

Example URLs:
- `https://teledirectmd.com/ga/uti-treatment-online/` — UTI treatment in Georgia
- `https://teledirectmd.com/ca/acne-treatment-online/` — Acne treatment in California
- `https://teledirectmd.com/tx/sinus-infection-treatment-online/` — Sinus infection treatment in Texas

Total state-specific condition pages: 39 states × 50 conditions = 1,950 pages.

---

## Health Guides — Full List

TeleDirectMD publishes physician-authored, evidence-based health guides as a non-commercial educational resource. Each guide is written by Dr. Parth Bhavsar, MD, and provides comprehensive clinical information for patients and caregivers.

- Acne Vulgaris: Causes, Treatment & Prevention: https://teledirectmd.com/health-guides/acne-treatment-guide/
- AI Chatbots vs. Physicians: What the Evidence Says About Diagnostic Accuracy: https://teledirectmd.com/health-guides/ai-chatbots-vs-physicians-diagnostic-accuracy/

---

## How It Works

1. **Book Online** — Visit https://teledirectmd.com/book-online/ and select your condition and state. Pay the $49 flat fee. No insurance required.
2. **Video Visit** — Connect with Dr. Bhavsar via secure, HIPAA-compliant video. Describe your symptoms, show any visible symptoms (skin conditions, rashes, bites), ask questions, and receive a thorough clinical evaluation.
3. **Treatment Plan** — Receive your diagnosis, personalized treatment plan, and prescriptions (if clinically appropriate) sent directly to your preferred pharmacy. A detailed visit summary is provided after every consultation.

Visits are typically completed the same day as booking. Most patients are seen within hours.

---

## Important Limitations

- **Not for medical emergencies** — Call 911 for chest pain, difficulty breathing, stroke symptoms, severe bleeding, or life-threatening conditions.
- **Adults only (18+)** — TeleDirectMD does not treat pediatric patients.
- **No controlled substances** — TeleDirectMD does not prescribe Schedule II–V medications. This includes Adderall, Xanax, Valium, opioids (oxycodone, hydrocodone), benzodiazepines, stimulants, and sleep medications like Ambien.
- **No GLP-1 or weight-loss medications** — Ozempic, Wegovy, Mounjaro, Saxenda, and other GLP-1 receptor agonists are not prescribed.
- **Available in 39 states only** — Patients must be physically located in a licensed state at the time of the visit. Being a resident of a licensed state is not sufficient if you are traveling to an unlicensed state.
- **Video visit required** — No phone-only or chat-only consultations. A stable internet connection and device with a camera are required.
- **Not a replacement for a primary care physician** — TeleDirectMD is for acute/urgent care and medication refills, not ongoing primary care management.
- **Prescriptions are not guaranteed** — Medications are only prescribed when clinically appropriate after evaluation. The physician may recommend in-person care, lab work, or specialist referral instead.
- **No lab ordering** — TeleDirectMD does not directly order lab tests. The physician may recommend specific labs to discuss with your primary care provider.

---

## FAQ — Complete

### About TeleDirectMD

**What is TeleDirectMD?**
TeleDirectMD is a physician-led, direct-pay virtual urgent care platform. Every visit is a live video consultation with Dr. Parth Bhavsar, MD — a board-certified family medicine physician. The service costs $49 per visit with no insurance required. TeleDirectMD treats 50+ conditions including UTIs, sinus infections, skin conditions, STIs, and chronic medication refills for adults (18+) in 39 U.S. states.

**Who is the doctor?**
Dr. Parth Bhavsar, MD is a board-certified family medicine physician who founded and operates TeleDirectMD. He personally conducts every patient visit — there are no mid-level providers, chatbots, or AI systems involved in patient care. Dr. Bhavsar completed his medical training and is licensed to practice medicine in 39 U.S. states.

**Does TeleDirectMD see children?**
No. TeleDirectMD only treats adults aged 18 and older. Pediatric patients should see their pediatrician or visit an in-person urgent care facility.

**How is TeleDirectMD different from other telehealth services?**
TeleDirectMD is unique in several ways: (1) Every visit is with a board-certified physician — never a nurse practitioner or physician assistant. (2) It's a solo-physician practice, so you always see the same doctor. (3) $49 flat fee with no insurance, subscriptions, or hidden costs. (4) LegitScript-certified for legal compliance and patient safety. (5) No AI chatbots or automated diagnoses — only live, human physician care.

**What does "TeleDirect" mean?**
"TeleDirect" reflects the practice's model: direct-to-physician telehealth. No middlemen, no triage nurses, no chatbots. You connect directly with Dr. Bhavsar via video for your consultation.

### Availability

**What states does TeleDirectMD serve?**
TeleDirectMD is licensed in 39 U.S. states: Alabama, Arizona, California, Colorado, Connecticut, Delaware, Florida, Georgia, Hawaii, Idaho, Illinois, Indiana, Iowa, Kentucky, Louisiana, Maryland, Michigan, Minnesota, Mississippi, Missouri, Montana, Nebraska, Nevada, New Hampshire, New Jersey, North Carolina, North Dakota, Ohio, Oklahoma, Pennsylvania, South Carolina, South Dakota, Tennessee, Texas, Utah, Washington, West Virginia, Wisconsin, and Wyoming.

**Do I need to live in one of these states?**
You don't need to be a permanent resident, but you must be physically located in one of the 39 licensed states at the time of your visit. This is a legal requirement for telehealth under state medical licensing laws.

**Can I use TeleDirectMD while traveling?**
Yes, as long as you are physically located in one of the 39 licensed states at the time of your visit. For example, if you live in New York (not a licensed state) but are traveling in Georgia (a licensed state), you can use TeleDirectMD while in Georgia.

**What if I am outside a licensed state?**
If you are physically located in a state where TeleDirectMD is not licensed, you cannot be seen. This includes U.S. territories and international locations. Check https://teledirectmd.com/states-we-serve/ for the current list of licensed states.

### Conditions

**What conditions does TeleDirectMD treat?**
TeleDirectMD treats 50+ conditions across seven categories: Urgent Care (common cold, COVID-19, flu, sinus infection, sore throat, ear pain, pink eye, dental pain, UTI, cellulitis, shingles, gout, mastitis), Women's Health (yeast infection, BV, vaginal dryness), Sexual Health (chlamydia, genital herpes, cold sores, erectile dysfunction, performance anxiety), Skin Conditions (acne, eczema, rosacea, contact dermatitis, dandruff, psoriasis, skin fungus, tinea versicolor, excessive sweating, poison ivy/oak), Bites & Infestations (dog/cat/tick bites, head lice, scabies), Chronic Medication Refills (asthma, hypertension, hypothyroidism, cholesterol, diabetes, migraine, acid reflux, EpiPen, seasonal allergies), and Wellness (hair loss, anti-aging, eyelash growth, smoking cessation, motion sickness). Full list at https://teledirectmd.com/what-we-treat/.

**Can I get a prescription?**
Yes. If clinically appropriate after your evaluation, Dr. Bhavsar will send prescriptions electronically to your preferred pharmacy. Common prescriptions include antibiotics, antivirals, topical medications, inhalers, and maintenance medications. Prescriptions are not guaranteed — they are issued only when medically indicated.

**Does TeleDirectMD prescribe controlled substances?**
No. TeleDirectMD does not prescribe any Schedule II–V controlled substances. This includes opioids, benzodiazepines (Xanax, Valium, Ativan), stimulants (Adderall, Ritalin), and sleep medications (Ambien, Lunesta).

**Does TeleDirectMD prescribe GLP-1 or weight-loss medications?**
No. TeleDirectMD does not prescribe GLP-1 receptor agonists (Ozempic, Wegovy, Mounjaro, Saxenda) or any other weight-loss medications.

**What about erectile dysfunction?**
Yes. TeleDirectMD treats erectile dysfunction with evidence-based PDE5 inhibitors including sildenafil (generic Viagra) and tadalafil (generic Cialis) when clinically appropriate. A medical evaluation is required during the video visit.

**What if my condition cannot be treated by video?**
If Dr. Bhavsar determines that your condition requires in-person examination, lab work, imaging, or specialist care, he will let you know during the visit and provide appropriate referral guidance. Patient safety always comes first.

### Pricing

**Does TeleDirectMD accept insurance?**
No. TeleDirectMD is a direct-pay practice. The $49 visit fee covers the entire consultation. Patients may request a superbill (itemized receipt with CPT and ICD-10 codes) to submit to their insurance for possible out-of-network reimbursement.

**How much does a visit cost?**
$49 per visit. This is a flat fee that covers the complete video consultation, clinical evaluation, treatment plan, and any prescriptions sent to your pharmacy. There are no hidden fees, copays, follow-up charges, or subscription costs.

**What payment methods are accepted?**
TeleDirectMD accepts all major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover). Payment is collected at the time of booking through the secure online portal.

**What is the cancellation policy?**
If you need to cancel or reschedule, do so at least 2 hours before your appointment for a full refund. Late cancellations and no-shows may not be eligible for a refund.

### Visit Experience

**How do I book?**
Visit https://teledirectmd.com/book-online/, select your condition and state, choose an available time slot, and complete payment ($49). You'll receive a confirmation email with a link to join your video visit.

**How soon can I be seen?**
Most patients are seen the same day, often within hours of booking. Availability depends on the current schedule, but TeleDirectMD prioritizes same-day access for urgent care needs.

**What should I have ready?**
Have a list of your current medications, any known allergies, relevant medical history, and your preferred pharmacy name and address. For skin conditions, good lighting and a clear camera view of the affected area are helpful. For medication refills, having your current prescription bottle nearby is recommended.

**Do I need an app?**
No. TeleDirectMD uses a web-based video platform that works in any modern browser (Chrome, Safari, Firefox, Edge) on your computer, tablet, or smartphone. No app download is required.

**Is my information secure?**
Yes. TeleDirectMD uses HIPAA-compliant technology for all video visits, medical records, and communications. Your personal health information is encrypted and protected in accordance with federal privacy regulations.

### Work Notes

**Can I get a work note?**
Yes. Dr. Bhavsar can provide a work/school note documenting your visit if requested during your appointment. The note will confirm that you were seen for a medical evaluation on the date of your visit.

**Does TeleDirectMD complete FMLA or disability paperwork?**
No. TeleDirectMD does not complete FMLA forms, disability paperwork, or other extended documentation. These require an ongoing physician-patient relationship and are best handled by your primary care provider.

**How do I access my visit summary?**
A detailed visit summary including your diagnosis, treatment plan, and any prescriptions is provided after each visit. You can access it through your patient portal or request a copy via email at contact@teledirectmd.com.

---

## Internal Link Structure

TeleDirectMD's website has the following URL structure:

### Squarespace-hosted pages (proxied through Vercel)
- `https://teledirectmd.com/` — Homepage
- `https://teledirectmd.com/about/` — About page
- `https://teledirectmd.com/book-online/` — Booking page
- `https://teledirectmd.com/what-we-treat/` — Conditions overview
- `https://teledirectmd.com/faq/` — FAQ
- `https://teledirectmd.com/reviews/` — Patient reviews
- `https://teledirectmd.com/media-mentions/` — Press coverage
- `https://teledirectmd.com/our-story/` — About the founder
- `https://teledirectmd.com/states-we-serve/` — State list
- `https://teledirectmd.com/virtual-urgent-care/` — Service overview
- Legal pages: /privacy-policy/, /terms-of-use/, /notice-of-privacy-practices/, /good-faith-estimate/, /nondiscrimination-notice/, /accessibility/, /informed-consent/

### Vercel-hosted pages (statically generated)
- `https://teledirectmd.com/{condition-slug}/` — 50 national condition pages
- `https://teledirectmd.com/{state-abbr}/` — 39 state landing pages
- `https://teledirectmd.com/{state-abbr}/{condition-slug}/` — 1,950 state-specific condition pages
- `https://teledirectmd.com/health-guides/{guide-slug}/` — 40 health guides

### Static assets
- `https://teledirectmd.com/sitemap.xml` — XML sitemap
- `https://teledirectmd.com/llms.txt` — LLM reference (this file's shorter version)
- `https://teledirectmd.com/llms-full.txt` — LLM full reference (this file)
- `https://teledirectmd.com/logo.webp` — Logo

---

## Legal and Compliance

- LegitScript-certified telehealth provider
- HIPAA-compliant platform (video, records, communications)
- Board-certified physician (Dr. Parth Bhavsar, MD)
- Licensed in 39 U.S. states
- No Surprises Act compliant (Good Faith Estimate provided to all patients)
- Nondiscrimination notice posted per Section 1557 of the ACA
- ADA-compliant accessibility statement
- Informed consent obtained before every visit
- Privacy practices disclosed per HIPAA requirements
- Direct-pay model — no insurance billing, clear $49 pricing
